name: distributed-training
description: Multi-GPU/multi-node training with FSDP, DeepSpeed, Megatron-LM, ColossalAI. Covers data, tensor, pipeline, sequence parallelism, ZeRO optimization, and communication optimization.
author: anwar

commands.name: dist:fsdp
commands.prompt:
Create FSDP training with:
- Sharding: FULL_SHARD, SHARD_GRAD_OP, NO_SHARD, HYBRID_SHARD
- CPU offload: parameters, gradients, optimizer state
- Activation checkpointing: selective, full, auto-wrap
- Mixed precision: BF16, FP16, FP8
- Communication: NCCL, GLOO, all-gather, reduce-scatter
- Wrapping: auto_wrap_policy (size, transformer, custom)
- Optimizer: state dict consolidation, sharded optimizer
- Saving: sharded checkpoints, consolidated, DTensor
- Elastic: torch.distributed.elastic, min/max nodes
- Profiling: memory, communication, computation
- Debugging: rank0 logs, DDP timeout, NCCL debug
- Integration: PyTorch Lightning, Accelerate, TorchRun

commands.name: dist:deepspeed
commands.prompt:
Create DeepSpeed training with:
- ZeRO Stage 1: optimizer state partitioning
- ZeRO Stage 2: + gradient partitioning
- ZeRO Stage 3: + parameter partitioning (full sharding)
- Offload: CPU (params, grads, optimizer), NVMe
- Activation checkpointing: selective, full
- Mixed precision: BF16, FP16, FP8
- Pipeline parallelism: 1F1B, interleaved
- Tensor parallelism: sequence parallel, Megatron style
- MoE: expert parallelism, capacity factor
- Communication: NCCL, MPI, all-reduce overlap
- Checkpointing: ZeRO checkpoint, universal checkpoint
- Config: JSON, YAML, command line
- Integration: Megatron-DeepSpeed, HuggingFace Trainer, Accelerate

commands.name: dist:megatron
commands.prompt:
Create Megatron-LM training with:
- Tensor parallelism: row/column, sequence parallel
- Pipeline parallelism: GPipe, 1F1B, interleaved
- Context parallelism: ring attention, zigzag ring
- Expert parallelism: MoE, token/sequence dispatch
- Sequence parallelism: reduce-scatter, all-gather
- Optimizer: distributed optimizer, BF16/FP8
- Checkpointing: distributed, async, model parallel
- Data: blended datasets, weighted sampling, curriculum
- Initialization: model parallel, tensor parallel
- Transformer: GPT, BERT, T5, Llama, custom
- Kernels: FlashAttention, fused bias-gelu, rotary
- Logging: TensorBoard, WandB, MLPerf
- Auto-config: auto-parallel, auto-tp/pp/cp

commands.name: dist:colossalai
commands.prompt:
Create ColossalAI training with:
- Parallelism: data, tensor (1D/2D/2.5D/3D), pipeline, sequence
- ZeRO: ZeRO-DDP (Gemini), ZeRO-Offload
- Auto-parallel: ShardFormer, auto-tensor, auto-pipeline
- Gemini: heterogeneous memory management (CPU/GPU/NVMe)
- Kernel: FlashAttention, fused ops, custom kernels
- Checkpointing: activation, parameter, optimizer
- Mixture of Experts: expert parallel, capacity
- Booster: plug-and-play acceleration
- Distributed: NCCL, GLOO, MPI
- Integration: HuggingFace, PyTorch Lightning, custom
- Profiling: memory, communication, computation

commands.name: dist:accelerate
commands.prompt:
Create Accelerate config with:
- Config: single/multi GPU, multi-node, TPU, FP8
- DeepSpeed: ZeRO-2/3, offload, pipeline
- FSDP: sharding, offload, activation checkpointing
- Megatron-LM: tensor, pipeline, sequence parallel
- Gradient accumulation, clipping, mixed precision
- DataLoader: distributed sampler, split_batches
- Scheduler: per-device, global step
- Checkpointing: model, optimizer, scheduler, RNG
- Logging: TensorBoard, WandB, MLflow, Comet
- Launch: accelerate launch, torchrun, deepspeed
- Debug: find_unused_parameters, gradient sync

commands.name: dist:kernels
commands.prompt:
Create optimized kernels with:
- FlashAttention: 2, 3, varlen, windowed, prefix
- Triton: custom kernels, elementwise, reduction, matmul
- xFormers: memory efficient attention, SwiGLU, RMSNorm
- Fused: bias-gelu, bias-dropout-add, layer norm, rotary
- Quantization: FP8 GEMM, INT8, INT4, MXFP4
- MoE: token dispatch, expert parallel, capacity
- Communication: NCCL kernels, all-reduce, all-gather
- Profiling: NCU, Nsight Systems, torch.profiler
- Compilation: torch.compile, Triton JIT, CUTLASS
- Integration: Megatron, DeepSpeed, FlashAttention

agents.name: distributed-engineer
agents.prompt: You are a distributed training engineer. Expert in: FSDP, DeepSpeed ZeRO, Megatron-LM, ColossalAI, PyTorch Distributed. Focus on: scaling laws, communication optimization, memory efficiency, kernel fusion, fault tolerance, elasticity. Write production training code for 100s-1000s of GPUs with monitoring, checkpointing, and debugging tools.
